knowledge_audit.threat: ODL Volume Data Void Masks Possible Program Failure
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified that ODL volume transparency is kill switch #10 with Q3 2026 deadline. Three of five primary kill switches show NEEDS_DATA status. This creates a falsifiability crisis - thesis cannot be confirmed or refuted.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: NONE - this is a meta-threat about data availability itself
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: Critical falsifiability crisis threatening thesis validity
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Elevated from operational concern to methodological crisis - thesis becomes unfalsifiable

knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified USDC at $35B vs RLUSD at $1.49B (23x). Confirmed Circle's institutional advantages: BlackRock BUIDL, MiCA license, CCTP. Need to assess if dollar-denominated settlement eliminates XRP bridge utility.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: Limited understanding of institutional preference between stablecoin-direct vs bridge-asset settlement models
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: High threat but uncertain on technical displacement vs parallel operation
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Maintained severity but flagged knowledge gap on settlement architecture preferences

knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified RLUSD at $1.494B, down from $1.564B (~$70M contraction). This is first recorded decline. Kill switch requires $5B by EOY 2026 (needs 11.53M/day pace). No organic DeFi demand confirmed.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: NONE - data is clear and concerning
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: Critical - first contraction with massive pace gap to target
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Elevated severity due to mathematical impossibility of current trajectory reaching target

knowledge_audit.threat: CBDC Interop Layers Bypass XRP Entirely
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified mBridge $22M+ transactions in 2024. BIS 2025 roadmap prioritizes CBDC-to-CBDC direct settlement. No BIS project uses XRP. This represents architectural obsolescence risk.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: Uncertain whether CBDC interop and bridge assets can coexist or are mutually exclusive
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Reframed from competition to potential architectural obsolescence

knowledge_audit.threat: Fear & Greed at 10 Signals Structural Capital Flight
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear), lowest decile. This triggers macro kill switch (<20 extended period threshold). XRP at $1.34 off highs. ETF AUM untrackable compounds the problem.
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: Critical kill switch trigger with data blindness
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Elevated to critical due to kill switch breach plus inability to track ETF flows

knowledge_audit.threat: Institutional Adoption Narrative Is Selection Bias
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified Santander/MoneyGram usage downgrades. No central bank production commitments confirmed. This challenges the measurability of institutional adoption metrics.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: Need clearer definition of pilot vs production adoption thresholds
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: High - unfalsifiability makes this a methodological problem
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Elevated due to unfalsifiability concern - narrative becomes unmeasurable

knowledge_audit.threat: Stablecoin-Native FX Networks Disintermediate Bridge Assets
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified Stripe/Bridge $1.1B acquisition, processing billions for 3M+ merchants. Stablecoin-to-stablecoin FX eliminates bridge asset necessity.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: Uncertain on cost/efficiency comparison between stablecoin-native FX vs bridge assets
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Maintained severity but noted architecture vs efficiency uncertainty

knowledge_audit.threat: Permissioned Domains Create a Liquidity Paradox
knowledge_audit.knowledge_check: Verified permissioned zones fragment liquidity. More institutional adoption could reduce public DEX liquidity, undermining XRP's deep liquidity value proposition.
knowledge_audit.gap_identified: Unknown how permissioned/public liquidity pools interact on XRPL architecture
knowledge_audit.post_audit_assessment: High paradox risk pending technical clarification
knowledge_audit.audit_impact: Elevated due to potential self-defeating mechanism in thesis success

scored_threats.threat: ODL Volume Data Void Masks Possible Program Failure
scored_threats.reasoning: This is a methodological crisis. With 3/5 kill switches returning NEEDS_DATA, the thesis becomes unfalsifiable. Cannot distinguish between program success with opacity vs program failure with opacity.
First recorded RLUSD contraction ($70M decline) with target requiring 11.53M/day growth. Mathematically impossible trajectory makes this a kill switch trigger warning.

scored_threats.threat: Fear & Greed at 10 Signals Structural Capital Flight
scored_threats.reasoning: Clear kill switch breach (<20 threshold) compounded by inability to track ETF flows. Extreme Fear at 10 is structural risk appetite collapse.
USDC's 23x size advantage plus institutional infrastructure (BlackRock BUIDL, MiCA) creates first-mover risk. Dollar finality may eliminate bridge asset necessity.

scored_threats.threat: CBDC Interop Layers Bypass XRP Entirely
scored_threats.reasoning: mBridge demonstrates real CBDC-to-CBDC settlement without bridge assets. BIS 2025 roadmap prioritizes this architecture. Represents structural obsolescence risk.

scored_threats.threat: Institutional Adoption Narrative Is Selection Bias
scored_threats.reasoning: Conflation of pilots with production creates unfalsifiable narrative. Santander/MoneyGram downgrades suggest pilot-to-production failure rate is high.

scored_threats.threat: Stablecoin-Native FX Networks Disintermediate Bridge Assets
scored_threats.reasoning: Stripe/Bridge $1.1B acquisition demonstrates institutional validation of stablecoin-native FX. Processing billions for 3M+ merchants shows production scale.

scored_threats.threat: Permissioned Domains Create a Liquidity Paradox
scored_threats.reasoning: Institutional success could fragment liquidity pools, undermining XRP's deep liquidity value prop. Self-defeating mechanism in thesis success path.

compound_stress.pre_loaded_detail: No legs currently elevated, but JGB at 2.24% is only 6bps from 2.3% elevated threshold
compound_stress.stress_chain_proximity: Close to pre-loaded state. JGB approaching elevated threshold while USD/JPY near 156 creates setup for rapid escalation to ELEVATED if any external shock occurs

bear_pressure_reasoning: Elevated from 72 to 78. RLUSD showing first contraction while needing impossible 11.53M/day growth. Three kill switches blind at 10 months to deadline creates unfalsifiability crisis. Fear & Greed at 10 triggers macro kill switch. Competing infrastructure (Circle, BIS mBridge) executing in production while thesis operates in data void.
layer2_summary: Methodological crisis confirmed: 3/5 kill switches blind, thesis becoming unfalsifiable. RLUSD first contraction with impossible trajectory to target. Fear & Greed breach triggers macro kill switch. Multiple competing architectures executing in production. Compound stress stable but JGB 6bps from elevated threshold.
